_note: POV channel (MasterPOVs model): 'Your Life as a [X] at Every Level / at Every Rank'. Showrunner pulls the next UNPRODUCED slug top-to-bottom; when exhausted, invent a NEW dramatic POV topic in the same spirit. FAVOR drama/curiosity: crime, war, empire, espionage, wealth, power, danger, history — not plain white-collar careers. Each needs docs/research/<slug>.md BEFORE writing. Frame crime/violence topics as cautionary, dramatized STORY (POV), never how-to/instructional.

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Spy at Every Level
queue.why: espionage; recruit -> field officer -> station chief -> the handlers above; huge curiosity

queue.title_hint: Your Life as Every Rank in the Roman Empire
queue.why: history + power; legionary -> centurion -> general -> emperor; MasterPOVs-proven

queue.title_hint: Your Life as Every Rank in the Mafia
queue.why: crime-family ladder associate -> made man -> capo -> don; cautionary POV

queue.title_hint: Your Life at Every Level of Generational Wealth
queue.why: wealth/status fantasy; trust-fund -> dynasty -> the families that own everything

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Samurai at Every Level
queue.why: history + honor + violence; ashigaru -> samurai -> daimyo -> shogun

queue.title_hint: Your Life as an Astronaut at Every Level
queue.why: aspirational + danger; candidate -> mission specialist -> commander -> the agency above

queue.title_hint: Your Life in a Cartel at Every Rank
queue.why: high-drama crime POV (cautionary); lookout -> sicario -> plaza boss -> kingpin

queue.title_hint: Your Life as Every Rank of a Medieval Kingdom
queue.why: history + power; peasant -> knight -> lord -> king -> the church/bankers above

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Pirate at Every Level
queue.why: adventure + danger; deckhand -> first mate -> captain -> pirate lord

queue.title_hint: Your Life as Secret Service at Every Level
queue.why: protection + power proximity; recruit -> agent -> detail lead -> the people they guard

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Gladiator at Every Level
queue.why: Rome + survival stakes; novice -> champion -> free man -> the lanista above

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Politician at Every Level
queue.why: power ladder; local -> senator -> president -> the donors above them

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Pro Athlete at Every Level
queue.why: fame + money; rookie -> star -> legend -> the owners above

queue.title_hint: Your Life as a Real Estate Mogul at Every Level
queue.why: tangible empire; first unit -> portfolio -> developer -> the capital above
